text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On our way back to the academy after a day out,
El Condor Pasa stops as though she's just
remembered something.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
By the way, my favorite female wrestler has a
match coming up!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
She may be young, but she's got real potential to
be a world champion!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I've been cheerin' her on ever since she made her
debut!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Her name is Ellie Condra! It's kinda similar to my
name, right?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Why don't we go cheer her on together, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's hard not to be interested after hearing El
Condor Pasa talk about her favorite wrestler.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Hurra! I can't wait!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The day of the match...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Vamos, Ellie Condra! You've got this! Get 'em!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A fierce competition unfolds in front of a large
and rowdy crowd. And the winner is...

text_block_list.name: Ellie Condra
text_block_list.text:
I won! I'm one step closer to world champion! I'm
gonna prove to everyone that I'm the world's
strongest!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Whew! That was intense! And what she said at the end!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I've got chills! Her strength! Her bravery! Her
fighting spirit!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: You can't help but respect her! Don't you agree?
choice_data_list: It really was a great match!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Right?! Let's take our time and go over the match
wh—

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Oh! Th-that's... There she is!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Excuse me! Um... Ellie Condra!

text_block_list.name: Ellie Condra
text_block_list.text: Do I know you?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I just watched your match! I'm such a big fan!

text_block_list.name: Ellie Condra
text_block_list.text:
Oh, thank you! I'm honored! You're an
Umamusume, aren't you?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Sí! And... my dream is to be the world's strongest
too!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
So... how about it? Let's see who can become the
world's strongest first!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Me on the track, or you in the ring?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bursting with excitement, El Condor Pasa
challenges Ellie Condra, who responds without
missing a beat.

text_block_list.name: Ellie Condra
text_block_list.text:
A race to become world champion, huh? All right,
you're on! But spoiler alert...

text_block_list.name: Ellie Condra
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna beat you there!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
No way, I won't lose! I'm definitely gonna get
there first!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Sigh... That was like a dream come true. I can't believe I met Ellie Condra!
choice_data_list: And now you've got to beat her!
And now you've got to beat her!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
That's right! Our stages may be different, but
we're both aiming to be the world's strongest!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: That means Ellie Condra is now my rival!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa's eyes blaze with fighting spirit. In
order to feed that flame, we should...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Can we?! Let's get yakiniku!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I heard Ellie Condra eats several kilograms of
meat every day!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I can't lose to her in meat either! Let's eat up and
build stamina!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can hardly say no with her grinning like that, so I
end up treating her to several kilograms of
yakiniku.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Now there's an idea! Let's have a little
competition!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Think you can keep up? I'm not gonna go easy on
ya!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa starts running. There's no way I
can keep up with her on foot, but...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Argh! I'll prove to everyone I'm the world's
strongest!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
An incredible match and a wonderful chance
meeting made this a day that I'll never forget.
